text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No sooner has the Takarazuka Kinen finished
than this year's summer camp begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has just had her big rematch with
Silence Suzuka, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Come on, time for roll call. Everyone get to the
assembly point!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...she still has to oversee the camp as part of the
student council.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At a glance, Air Groove looks as highly motivated
as ever as we prepare for her comeback at the
Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe Air Groove isn't aware of it herself, but
glimpses of her dark mood are slipping through.
She's clearly less talkative than usual too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never expected to see Air Groove like this. It's
as though she's become a different person
entirely.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It appears that dark clouds of uncertainty have
settled around her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen has taken a bigger toll on
her than she realizes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her like this pains me as well. I wonder if
there's something I can say to cheer her up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Although even if there were...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I think you're the only one who can truly get her
back on her feet.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: After all, you're her one and only trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't hesitate to seek me out should you ever
need my assistance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Godspeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wonder what I can possibly say to Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look back on all the time we've spent together
and rack my brain for something I can do to help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to help her find her footing again at the
G2 Sapporo Kinen, ready to storm the G1
challenge waiting in the fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in order to do that, I need to get Air Groove
up and running now!
